tracks.name: Track A — Pre-launch ops (gating)
tracks.description: Operational gates that must close before first-org mDL launch. Engineering for the launch path is already complete per memory/iphase_completion.md; this track is the operator-driven sequence.

tracks.name: Track B — Post-launch hardening (engineering, not gating)
tracks.description: Hardening that lifts the launch into the J-phase posture: TEE Nitro Enclave + delegation executor, mainnet contracts (DistrictRegistry, SnapshotAnchor, DebateMarket), on-chain receipt anchoring, Merkle h3Index inclusion proofs. Engineering-bound but does not gate first-org launch.

tracks.name: Track C — Phase 2 precision
tracks.description: ACS population layer + density-aware K-anonymity + SLDU/SLDL expansion + multi-state G3 measurement + Postal Bubble disambiguation + CT BAF/TIGER vintage shim. Post-launch, US-only expansion of measurement precision.

tracks.name: Track D — International expansion
tracks.description: CA / GB / AU rep-lookup wiring, cross-border campaign schema, multi-country coalition delivery, TIGER 2026 monitoring + DOGE/Census resilience playbook. Post-Phase-2, requires Phase 2 substrate to be sound.

tracks.name: Track E — Substrate writer wire-ups
tracks.description: Four substrate-shipped-but-writer-unbound items from v1 sweep. Each has the type/field/mutation but the producer side isn't threaded — keeping them visible so 'reputationTier', 'atlasVersion', 'debate field', and 'brandingAccent' eventually surface as advertised. Cheap, focused cleanup.

tracks.name: Track F — Partnership + platform
tracks.description: AN OSDI sync, OSDI compliance namespace, developer portal, CRM integration story, SDK publish pipelines. Each gated on a partnership or RFP outcome — bundling so the sequencing is visible.
